sections.title: It's Dubai & it's Croquet.
sections.subtitle: A game of skill, underhanded compliments and filthily polite smack talk.

sections.title: The 2023 Croquet Season is Upon Us
sections.subtitle: It's serious. It's time to play with some balls.
sections.body: Croquet is basically the best thing since sliced bread.  If you disagree, stop reading.

sections.title: The 2023 Clements Cup
sections.subtitle: Season Opener - 18th February
sections.text: It's so on. Game-time mallet fans. Get those whites starched and cravats oiled.

actions.label: What even is this? Tell me more...

sections.title: OMG Stop it already, lets do this
sections.text:
"I'm excited, I'm limbered up AND I look fabulous in white. 

Show me the money baby, where do I sign up....?"

sections.title: Why Should I Start Playing Croquet
sections.subtitle: There are so many reasons to start playing croquet in Dubai

items.title: Better Looking
items.text: You will become 120% more attractive and alluring.

items.title: Smarter
items.text: Once you have wrapped your head around the rules , you'll be doing Sudokus faster than your grandmother.

items.title: Stronger
items.text: Croquet will make you strong like an animal.

testimonials.quote:
"After our humble and wildly successful victory at the 2021 Clements
Cup, we cannot wait to see how this season plays out"
